body: I'm trying to implement a trait with an async method but I keep getting lifetime errors.
Are you using async-trait crate? That's the standard approach for async in traits.
I tried it but the #[async_trait] macro gives me a different error about Send bounds.
You might need #[async_trait(?Send)] if your future doesn't need to be Send. Or check if your inner types implement Send.
That was it! One of my types had an Rc instead of Arc. Switching to Arc fixed the Send bound issue.
